steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence states that Himalayan balsam had an effect value of ______. The task is to find the exact value for Himalayan balsam in the table, where Himalayan balsam is listed as the neighboring species.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — '0.7905': This is the effect value in the row where Himalayan balsam is the neighboring species, paired with marsh woundwort. ✓
  • Choice B — '−0.3238': This value belongs to leafy spurge (paired with Lewis flax), a different neighboring species. ✗
  • Choice C — '−3.2570': This value does not appear anywhere in the table. ✗
  • Choice D — '0.4729': This value belongs to Canadian wood betony (paired with mayapple), a different neighboring species. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
